description: Six speakers converge on only two events despite much discussion; one is company-wide, one is a subgroup technical session.

events.title: Stakeholder Product Demo
events.attendees: Alice, Bob, Carol, Dave, Eve, Frank
events.reasoning: All six speakers confirm the stakeholder product demo on Friday February 27 at 10 AM for 2 hours. Alice corrects herself from 'this Friday' to 'next Friday' (Feb 27).

events.title: API Documentation Handoff
events.reasoning: Bob and Frank schedule an API documentation handoff on Tuesday at 9 AM for 90 minutes. Grace is included but is not a speaker. Alice explicitly states the other four speakers are not in this meeting.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 2 events: all-hands product demo on Friday and a subgroup technical handoff on Tuesday.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Tuesday=Feb 24, Friday Feb 27. Grace is a non-speaker attendee of the technical handoff. Alice corrects herself on the date.
